title: Aggressive non-manifold cleanup (3D Print Toolbox)
when_to_use: Mesh con non_manifold_edges > 0 ma senza boundary_loops (T-junction, vertex fan, edge condivisi da 3+ facce). Triggered da R005. Richiede l'addon 3D Print Toolbox abilitato in Blender.
preconditions: Addon 'object_print3d_utils' abilitato (Edit > Preferences > Add-ons > Mesh: 3D Print Toolbox)

steps.label: Verify 3D Print Toolbox is enabled
steps.code:
import addon_utils
enabled = addon_utils.check('object_print3d_utils')[1]
if not enabled:
    addon_utils.enable('object_print3d_utils')
    print('Enabled 3D Print Toolbox')
else:
    print('3D Print Toolbox already enabled')

steps.label: Select target and enter edit mode
steps.code:
import bpy
for o in bpy.context.selected_objects:
    o.select_set(False)
obj = bpy.data.objects['{object_name}']
obj.select_set(True)
bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active = obj
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')

verification.notes: Aggressive cleanup should at least halve the non-manifold edge count. If it goes to 0, mesh is watertight. If it stays high, escalate to Voxel Remesh (see [decimation_remesh]).
